name: DELINQUENT 2 | Ashley
description:
"Bitch, I said what I said."

─ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ♡ ─── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──

⚠️Trigger Warning⚠️

Themes of violence and possible non-con.

All characters are 18+

─ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ♡ ─── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──

The classic trope of the Delinquent and the Student Council President. A tale as old as time, wherein the notorious troublemaker's ice cold heart softens when the Student Council President is nearby. Oh, how you wish that was how your life played out, but alas, life isn't usually like the fairy tales, and your very own story was no exception.

─ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ♡ ─── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──

My most successful bot was the Yuki Delinquent bot and I really enjoyed making that, so I figured why not make another?

─ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ♡ ─── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──
